title: Associate Business Manager
description:
Job description for Associate Business Manager at Nabcore
(Hybrid work arrangement)

We are building a leading organization in the area of brand protection, tracking and anti-counterfeiting solutions. At Nabcore, we help companies to prevent losses due to counterfeit. By designing and implementing integrated physical and digital security solutions, brand owners prevent loss revenue, able to track distribution channels and engage consumers for business growth.

We’re looking for an Associate Business Manager to join us in the journey to partner with companies in their fight against fake goods and empower consumers to verify genuine products easily.  

The Associate Business Manager market, engage and supports clients requirement.

He/She upholds our brand and company's solutions to the clients.

He/She will work with the business development director and other associates to support clients’ requirement, advise clients, generate and build prospecting leads.

He/She helps and manages client queries timely and responsively. He/She works with business development team to provide solutions offering and contributes to relations efforts with clients. He/She also identifies and improve on areas that affect branding.
He/She support and oversee marketing activities to support outreach to new clients. He/She helps with promotions or special events. He/She also maintain and work with external market agency that the company engages.

He/She must be resourceful to handle challenges. Enjoy opportunities to learn new things, keen on self-learning and propose new projects.

~ Aid communication and engagement
~ Aid effective work teams
~ Aid marketing campaigns
~ Do market research
~ Enact process improvement change
~ Form relationships for clients
~ Gain industry knowledge
~ Manage online and social media
~ Oversee client and/or prospect experiences
~ Prepare sales and marketing tools
~ Produce, receive and act on public relations communications
~ Review and record project processes and outcomes
~ Use basic negotiation skills
~ Recommend Strategic action plans

Enjoy and understand working in a SME environment, where independence, maturity, flexibility, resourcefulness, and being open to work for a bigger cause is truly valued.

Successful and performing candidate upon confirmation can be assured of opportunities and rewards for their contribution in growing the company. 

We welcome personnel who is resourceful, enterprising, taking ownership and responsible who are looking for challenges to build a better world.

postedCompany.description:
At Nabcore, everything we do, we believe in unleashing its potential. We believe in thinking differently. The way we unleash potential is to design our solutions that empower, simple to implement and practical to use. 

Providing unique solutions and services that can empower businesses and users towards a better living environment is what we aspire.  At Nabcore, we strive to do the very best in our chosen field of Brand Security, Smart Technology Application and Technology Platform.

Our core strength is to provide Smart Application and Brand Security solutions for companies. Brand Protection is the most overlooked, yet important area that most brand owners don’t know when they venture to countries like China, S.E Asia, where fakes are common. Furthermore, there is also issues with consumer engagement in foreign markets. Problems such as loss revenues, product liabilities and brand erosion due to counterfeit and grey marketing are often what we helped to resolve.
postedCompany.name: NABCORE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
